narrative:
Montgomery City has 9,065 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.5% D−R vs -22.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
